visual_description: A medium shot captures a man in a white shirt and black tie standing in a dimly lit, modern-looking room. He has a serious expression and his hands are on his hips. In the foreground, the back of another person's head is visible, looking towards a television screen. The TV displays a security camera feed of a hallway, with a timestamp at the bottom reading "16:14". In the background, through a glass partition, other people can be seen moving in an office-like space. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner. The camera remains steady, focusing on the man in the white shirt. A man speaks in a calm, professional, and slightly authoritative tone, as if giving a report or instructions. His voice is steady and clear, with a measured pace. "凶徒20分钟后到的。" The camera angle shifts to a close-up, over-the-shoulder view of the person in the foreground. We see the side of their face as they look at the man in the white shirt, who is now out of focus in the background.
